ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial metric (e.g., RS_BOA, RS_SSP) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial metric */,
  "calculation_formula" TEXT /* Formula used to calculate the financial metric */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the metric belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the metric (e.g., daily, monthly) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., percentage, dollars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES metric_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric value */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the financial metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the value was recorded */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the metric value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the value was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the value (e.g., financial statements, market data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_values_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES financial_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_values_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES metric_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_category_mappings" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial metric */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_category_mappings_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES financial_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_category_mappings_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES metric_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the company was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the company's information was last updated */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the company is listed */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_metrics" (
  "company_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company metric */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the financial metric for the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_metrics_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES financial_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, portfolio manager, executive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's information was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the financial metric */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial metric being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the financial metric was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES financial_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_metrics" (
  "report_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report metric */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the financial metric in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES financial_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_metrics_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
